pre_commit.description: Strict inventory, drift, full tests, browser smoke (Playwright), API+Madeira smoke, release gate

steps.description: Repo vs runtime drift (agent/A2A inventory, tools policy)
Full pytest suite via scripts/test.py all
Browser smoke; Scenario 0 registry (Playwright per DEVELOPER_CHECKLIST)
Unified release gate (HLK, process_list header, vault links, ...)

compliance_mirror_emit.description: Initiative 14/18: preflight CSV row counts then emit compliance mirror upsert SQL to artifacts/sql/compliance_mirror_upsert.sql (operator reviews before DB apply)

steps.description: Row counts from git CSVs (process_list, baseline_organisation, FINOPS counterparty register)
Write full mirror upsert SQL (process_list + baseline + finops counterparty) for operator review
